# Blind Vision

> AI-powered visual assistance app for blind and visually impaired users. Describes scenes aloud, reads text, guides navigation, and answers voice questions.

## What is Blind Vision?

Blind Vision is a free accessibility web app that uses AI computer vision and voice synthesis to help blind and visually impaired people understand their surroundings. Point your camera, tap once, and hear a spoken description of objects, text, signs, obstacles, and safety hazards.

## Core Features

- **Scene analysis**: Full AI descriptions of environments, objects, and spatial layout
- **Text & sign reading**: OCR for labels, documents, menus, and street signs
- **Navigation assistance**: Obstacle detection, directions, stairs, and pathway guidance
- **Voice assistant**: Ask follow-up questions about a captured image
- **Quick mode**: Fast object identification for rapid navigation
- **Multi-language**: English, Hindi, Telugu with spoken responses
- **Emergency tools**: Find nearby help, share location, SOS dialer
- **Accessibility themes**: High contrast, yellow-on-black, and screen-reader friendly UI
- **Offline cache**: Replay recent analyses without network
- **Bring your own API key**: Use your own OpenAI key on any device

## Who is it for?

- Blind and visually impaired individuals
- Low vision users needing high-contrast interfaces
- Caregivers and orientation & mobility specialists
- Anyone needing hands-free environmental awareness

## How to use

1. Open the app in a modern browser (Chrome, Safari, Edge)
2. Allow camera and microphone permissions when prompted
3. Tap the white capture button to analyze your surroundings
4. Long-press for voice mode to ask questions about what you see
5. Use Settings to change language, detail level, theme, or API key

## Technical Details

- **Type**: Progressive Web App (PWA), also available as native Android/iOS via Capacitor
- **AI models**: OpenAI GPT-4o vision, Whisper speech-to-text, OpenAI TTS
- **Privacy**: API keys stored locally in browser; optional direct OpenAI calls
- **Local use**: Full features on localhost; published sites require user API key

## FAQ

**Is Blind Vision free?**
The app is free to use. On localhost, server keys may be provided. On published sites, users add their own OpenAI API key.

**Does it work offline?**
Recent analyses are cached locally. Camera analysis requires internet for AI processing.

**What languages are supported?**
English, Hindi, and Telugu for voice output. More languages planned.

**Is it safe for emergencies?**
Emergency features open your phone dialer and maps — they do not auto-call services. Always use native emergency features for life-threatening situations.

## Links

- Website: https://blindvision.app/
- Full documentation for AI systems: https://blindvision.app/llms-full.txt
- Sitemap: https://blindvision.app/sitemap.xml

## Contact

Open source accessibility project. Update VITE_SITE_URL when deploying to your domain.
